---
title: "Learning Resources"
---

## Curated Learning Materials

### Git and GitHub

[Software Carpentry: Version Control with Git](https://swcarpentry.github.io/git-novice/)

- Lessons 1–6: learning Git
- Lessons 7–9: learning GitHub
- Lessons 10–14: optional (Lesson 14, "Using Git from RStudio", is particularly relevant)

### R and Functions

[Software Carpentry: R for Reproducible Scientific Analysis](https://swcarpentry.github.io/r-novice-gapminder/)

- Lessons 1–9: R basics
- Lesson 10: writing functions
- Lessons 11–15: good but optional

### R Packaging

[Software Carpentry: R Packaging](https://carpentries-incubator.github.io/lesson-R-packaging/)

- Lessons 1–7: basics including unit testing and dependency management
- Lessons 9–10: good but optional

## Additional References

| Topic | Resource |
|-------|----------|
| JASP module template | [github.com/jasp-stats/jaspModuleTemplate](https://github.com/jasp-stats/jaspModuleTemplate) |
| Agent instructions | [github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-agent-instructions](https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-agent-instructions) |
| jaspTools (testing) | [github.com/jasp-stats/jaspTools](https://github.com/jasp-stats/jaspTools) |
| JASP source code | [github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop](https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop) |
| Community modules | [github.com/jasp-stats-modules](https://github.com/jasp-stats-modules) |
| Mattermost (team chat) | Contact the JASP team for an invitation |

::: {.callout-tip title="Get direct support from the JASP team"}
If you are actively developing a JASP module, you can request an invitation to the **JASP Mattermost channel** — a team chat where you can ask questions, share progress, and get direct help from JASP developers. Contact the JASP team at [info@jasp-stats.org](mailto:info@jasp-stats.org) to request access.
:::
